user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the connection details for your router or MAGNUM controller.

data_description.router_name: Friendly name shown in the UI (e.g. 'Studio A Router'). Defaults to the IP address if left blank.

profile.title: Router Profile — {router_name}
profile.description:
Set the number of sources and destinations. Upload your MAGNUM profile_availability CSV to populate these automatically.

{csv_warnings}

data_description.max_sources: Highest source port number in your profile (sources and destinations do not need to be equal).
data_description.max_destinations: Highest destination port number in your profile.
data_description.levels: V = video only. Append A, B, C… for audio. E.g. VABC routes video + first 3 audio levels.
data_description.csv_upload: Upload your MAGNUM profile_availability.csv export to auto-populate counts and names. Supports partial exports — a sources-only file will only update the source count.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect — check the IP address and port.
error.csv_parse_error: File could not be parsed. Check the format and try again, or set counts manually.

init.title: Configure — {router_name}
init.description:
**Connection settings** for {router_name}.

These apply immediately without a restart. Click Next to review or update the router profile (sources, destinations, CSV).

data_description.levels: V = video only. Append A, B, C… for audio levels. Example: VABC routes video + first 3 audio levels.
data_description.reconnect_delay: How long to wait before reconnecting after a network drop.
data_description.connect_timeout: Maximum time to establish the initial TCP connection.

profile.title: Update Profile — {router_name}

data_description.max_sources: Total number of sources in your router profile.
data_description.max_destinations: Total number of destinations in your router profile.
data_description.csv_upload: Upload your profile_availability.csv to update counts and names automatically. You will see a summary of changes before they are applied.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination. When multiple routers are configured, specify device_id or router_name to target a specific one.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: HA device registry ID of the router. Find it in Settings → Devices & Services → your router → device info.

router_name.name: Router Name
router_name.description: Friendly name or IP address of the router (as entered during setup). Case-insensitive.

destination.name: Destination
destination.description: Destination port number (1-based, matches Quartz port number).

source.name: Source
source.description: Source port number (1-based, matches Quartz port number).

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC). Defaults to the router's configured levels.
